# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: user-route
        paths:
          - /users
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        strip_path: true

  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: order-route
        paths:
          - /orders
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        strip_path: true

  - name: product-service
    url: http://product-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: product-route
        paths:
          - /products
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        strip_path: true

plugins:
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      minute: 100
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    services:
      - user-service
      - order-service
      - product-service

  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_names:
        - apikey
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    services:
      - user-service
      - order-service
      - product-service
